recent_announcements.summary: LMW Limited has informed the Exchange about the Intimation of ESG Rating under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 |SUBJECT: General Updates
NCL Industries Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Monthly Business Updates for the month of June 2026 |SUBJECT: Monthly Business Updates
Dr. Reddy's Laboratories Limited has informed the Exchange about Conference Call |SUBJECT: Analysts/Institutional Investor Meet/Con. Call Updates

Significant increase in volume has been observed in SG Mart Limited. The Exchange, in order to ensure that investors have latest relevant information about the company and to inform the market place so that the interest of the investors is safeguarded, had written to the company. SG Mart Limited has submitted their response. |SUBJECT: Spurt in Volume
